calendar.matters:
CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jul-25-2007 Off Calendar

Minor'S Compromise.
Off Calendar Jun-28-2007 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Minor's Compromise hearing this day.
Dept. 218, Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Helen Sorep-Matley.
Roderick Bushnell, Esq. for Petitioner: Susan c. Freeman, present as Guardian ad litem for: Ella Freeman, a minor Claimant, was sworn and examined.
On the basis of evidence received, the Petition is granted and compromise is approved.
Attorney's Fees $11,585.83
Medical Expenses $381.29
Costs $3,275.41
A net balance of $34,757.47 to be deposited into a blocked account with Bank of America, 955 El Camino Real, South San Francisco, CA. 94080, no withdrawals shall be made without a written court order or until the minor reaches the age of 18 years.
Order Approving Compromise of Claim and Order to Deposit Money Into Blocked Account signed in open court.

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Nov-22-2006 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: DEFENDANT EVAN AUCHARD'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT. Taking as true all facts pleaded in the complaint, and ignoring all statements not based on pleaded facts, the demurrer is overruled. 10 days to answer. Prevailing party to prepare form of order. (301/PJB/JF) Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR #8600
